description: DFT relaxed V0 coordinates, PBC distance calculation

trends.Li-Br_vs_Li-Cl: Li-Br 0.10-0.26 A longer in all compositions
trends.P-S_constant: ~2.06 A across all compositions (PS4 framework invariant)

physics.longer_bond_weaker: Longer Li-Br -> weaker ionic interaction -> lower B0/E
